message:
feat: add notcurses-based TUI toolbar

Replace PNG-based toolbar with notcurses TUI library:
- Add Zig bindings for notcurses (notcurses.zig)
- Implement toolbar with navigation buttons and URL bar
- Create NcViewer for full notcurses-based rendering
- Remove dark/light theme PNG assets
- Update build.zig to link notcurses-core

notcurses provides native terminal widgets with proper text input,
mouse handling, and pixel graphics via Kitty protocol.
